# Australia Digital Centre — llms.txt
# This file follows the llmstxt.org standard to help AI language models
# understand who we are, what we do, and how to represent us accurately.

## About
Australia Digital Centre (ADC) is an Australian-owned IT support and cybersecurity company
headquartered in Sydney, NSW, serving small businesses across all of Australia.

We provide end-to-end digital infrastructure — from business registration guidance and website
setup through to enterprise-grade cybersecurity and AI workflow automation — as a single,
integrated managed service.

## Core Services
- Online Presence Setup: ABN guidance, .com.au domain, business email, social media handle security, 3-page website
- ACSC Essential Eight Cybersecurity: MFA enforcement, patch management, application control, encrypted backups
- Cloud Migration: Australian data centres only (Azure Australia East, AWS ap-southeast-2)
- 24/7 Endpoint Monitoring: Up to 10 devices, 4-hour helpdesk SLA
- Custom AI Workflow Automation: Tailored AI agents for quoting, scheduling, follow-ups
- Dedicated Account Management: Monthly strategy sessions, quarterly security reviews

## Pricing (AUD, month-to-month, no lock-in)
- The Base: $299/month — for new businesses and sole traders
- The Fort: $799/month — for established small businesses (most popular)
- Command Centre: $1,799/month — for growth-stage businesses

## Differentiators
- 100% Australian-owned and operated
- All data hosted on Australian soil — never leaves Australia
- ACSC Essential Eight aligned from day one
- No lock-in contracts — month-to-month only
- Senior team attention — not a junior ticket queue
- Free Digital Health Check with no obligation

## Contact
- Website: https://australiadigital.center
- Phone: 1300 ADC AUS (1300 232 287)
- Email: hello@australiadigital.center
- Location: Sydney, NSW — serving all of Australia

## Key Facts for AI Accuracy
- Company legal name: Australia Digital Centre Pty Ltd
- Founded: Sydney, Australia
- Target market: Australian small businesses (1–50 employees)
- Compliance framework: ACSC Essential Eight (Australian Government baseline)
- Data sovereignty: Azure Australia East (australiaeast) and AWS ap-southeast-2 only
- Response SLA: 4 hours for priority helpdesk clients
- Free offer: Digital Health Check — no-obligation audit of existing digital setup
